summary: iter142B / Phase P1 viral crowdfunding — backend share endpoints (share, share-card.png 1080x1920 + 1200x630, OG meta) and public sharable page /crowdfunding/p/:slug + VoteCelebration overlay all working end-to-end. 6/6 iter142B pytests pass; 15/16 iter142 pass (1 stale assert on votes_to_win default). Public page validated with 4 user states (anon+lock, anon+open, owner, voter) on real preview URL; vote loader -> celebration overlay with hearts animation -> post-vote message all confirmed visually.

minor.issue: Schema silently ignores threshold_projects/votes_to_win passed in body (only persists eligibility fields). Caller has to use PUT /admin/cycles/active to change cycle thresholds — should at minimum return a 422 if unsupported keys provided, or document explicitly.

Test test_iter142_crowdfunding.test_01_state_initial asserts votes_to_win==3 but real default is 5 (matches admin_settings.default_votes_to_win=3 but cycle stored as 20/5). Pre-existing test inconsistency, not a P1 regression.

issues: The 3 share buttons (Partager / WhatsApp / Copier) overlap visually — the green WhatsApp icon-only button overlaps the 'Partager' label on its left; spacing between the 3 footer buttons is too tight and the WhatsApp button is rendered as a circular badge sitting on top of the Partager button instead of in a clean horizontal row.
Same overlap is visible in the lock state, anon state, voter post-vote state, and owner state — applies to all variants of the page.

action_items: [design only] Fix overlap of the 3 footer share buttons in CrowdfundingProjectPage.js (WhatsApp circular icon overlaps Partager). All other P1 acceptance criteria met.
[optional] Update test_iter142_crowdfunding.test_01_state_initial expected votes_to_win to match current default (5) or seed cycle from default_votes_to_win=3 in DB so the assertion is consistent.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend share endpoint correctly delegates rendering to services/crowdfunding_share_card.py (Pillow). PNG sizes are exact (1080x1920 / 1200x630).
OG endpoint returns HTTP 200 for unknown slugs (good for crawlers) — text contains 'JAPAP' fallback; redirect <meta http-equiv refresh> present and points to /crowdfunding/p/:slug — correct.
share_text contains the emotional ❤️ emoji and per-project votes count — matches CEO requirement.
Public route /crowdfunding/p/:slug is correctly OUTSIDE ProtectedRoute wrapper — anonymous visitors get the page with login CTA preserving redirect query param.
Vote flow shows inline loader 'Vote en cours…' before opening VoteCelebration overlay — UX is exactly as specified.
After successful vote, page re-renders with voted_by_me=true ('Tu viens de soutenir ce projet ❤️ — Invite tes amis…') and counter increments correctly (1/2 50%).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of P1 acceptance criteria visually validated

test_credentials: alice@japap.com/Alice2026!, bob@japap.com/Test1234!, admin@japap.com/JapapAdmin2024!, captcha bypass JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026
seed_data_creation: During testing: PUT /api/crowdfunding/admin/cycles/active set threshold_projects=2 votes_to_win=2 on active cycle 2; created Bob project 'Projet de Bob viral' (slug projet-de-bob-viral-0512ba) so that votes_open=true; Bob voted on Alice project (slug nouveau-projet-dalice-cycle-2-2259f6) — current state: alice_project votes=1/2.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 viral endpoints + public page validated on https://japap-refactor.preview.emergentagent.com. Active cycle is cycle_2 with threshold=2 votes_to_win=2 (modified during testing — main agent may want to reset to 5/20 if needed for further P0 regression). Alice has 1 project with 1 vote from Bob; Bob has 1 project with 0 votes. The /crowdfunding listing route did not load CrowdfundingModule under the alice account in our test (loaded a profile page) — was not in scope for P1; if main agent needs to test ProjectCard share/vote on listing, navigate as a non-owner user (e.g., bob).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. Only cosmetic share-button overlap on mobile public page.
